positive: A majestic, stylized forest creature, a mythical 'Sun Fox', seated in a meditative pose. The fox has vibrant, ethereal fur that shifts from deep sapphire blue to glowing emerald green, highlighted by golden, filamentous whiskers and a flowing, iridescent tail that mimics bioluminescent moss. It is surrounded by a simplified, geometric landscape of crystal-clear forest pools and oversized, glowing fantasy flora. The composition is centered, featuring a strong silhouette and dramatic negative space. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau combined with stylized graphic pop art. Lighting: High contrast, ethereal backlight, emphasizing the creature's glowing features against a deep indigo background. Color Palette: Sapphire, Emerald, Gold, Indigo. Perfect for a clean, single-color screen print or apparel graphic. Minimalist texture, crisp lines, vector-like quality. --ar 1:1
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, realistic photo, watermark, text, signature, logo, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, mutated, messy, jpeg compression, --ar 1:1
